evals.prompt: 我刚添加了一个新的用户登录页面，包括前端表单组件和后端验证逻辑，帮我生成一个合适的 commit message
evals.expected_output: 生成的 commit message 应该遵循 Conventional Commits 规范，类型为 feat，作用域可能为 auth 或 ui，描述简洁准确

assertions.description: Commit message should start with 'feat' type
Commit message should contain scope in parentheses (e.g., (auth) or (ui))
Description should use imperative present tense (e.g., 'add' not 'added')
Description should not end with period

evals.prompt: 修复了购物车页面在 Safari 浏览器上的显示问题，商品数量显示错位，已经调整了 CSS
evals.expected_output: 生成的 commit message 应该类型为 fix，作用域可能为 ui 或 cart，描述应准确反映修复的问题

assertions.description: Commit message should start with 'fix' type
Commit message should contain scope related to cart or ui
Description should mention Safari or display issue
Description should use imperative present tense

evals.prompt: 更新了项目 README 文件，添加了更详细的安装步骤和使用示例，也修正了几个错别字
evals.expected_output: 生成的 commit message 应该类型为 docs，作用域可能为 readme，描述应说明文档更新内容

assertions.description: Commit message should start with 'docs' type
Commit message should contain scope related to readme
Description should mention installation steps or examples
Description should use imperative present tense

evals.prompt: 我刚修改了配置文件，升级了 webpack 从 4.x 到 5.x，还调整了一些构建配置，需要提交这些更改
evals.expected_output: 生成的 commit message 应该类型为 chore 或 build，作用域可能为 config 或 build，描述应反映配置更新

assertions.description: Commit message should start with 'chore' or 'build' type
Commit message should contain scope related to build or config
Description should mention webpack upgrade or configuration
Description should use imperative present tense
